meta.description: A human procedure — a named, step-by-step process that people follow to complete a task consistently

purpose.description: What this procedure achieves and why it exists

owner.description: Person responsible for keeping this procedure up to date

frequency.description: How often this procedure is performed, e.g. daily, per release, on demand

estimatedDuration.description: Typical time to complete, e.g. 30 minutes, 2 hours

prerequisites.description: What must be in place or completed before starting

expectedOutcome.description: What a successful completion looks like

failureMode.description: What to do if the procedure fails or cannot be completed

aiSkill.description: UUID of the Kanecta skill item that implements this procedure for AI execution

references.description: Links to relevant documentation, tools or systems

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_6968f981_d8c6_4213_96a7_48941fd9ba7c" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "purpose" TEXT,
    "owner" TEXT,
    "team" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    "version" TEXT,
    "last_reviewed" TEXT,
    "next_review" TEXT,
    "frequency" TEXT,
    "estimated_duration" TEXT,
    "prerequisites" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "expected_outcome" TEXT,
    "failure_mode" TEXT,
    "ai_skill" UUID,
    "related_procedures" UUID[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "references" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_6968f981_d8c6_4213_96a7_48941fd9ba7c" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_6968f981d8c64213_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_6968f981d8c64213_ai_skill" FOREIGN KEY ("ai_skill") REFERENCES items(id)
)
